places.name: Bara Imambara
places.notes: Historic mosque-cum-mausoleum complex with the famous Bhul Bhulaiya labyrinth.

places.name: Chhota Imambara
places.notes: Ornate 19th-century imambara, beautifully lit during Muharram.

name: Delhi
notes: Capital — layered with Mughal and modern history

places.name: Red Fort (Lal Qila)
places.notes: UNESCO World Heritage Mughal-era fort; site of the PM's Independence Day address.

places.name: India Gate
places.notes: War memorial arch on Rajpath; lovely at dusk.

name: Hanoi
notes: Vietnam's capital — old quarter charm, lakes, and street food.
